selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel overlay-governance reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the game-theory rosetta parent into controller-facing fences for non-binding overlays, explicit namespace discipline, anti-agent defaults, anti-payoff-selection drift, and anti-equilibrium or predictive overread.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel math-class follow-on after the game-overlay governance fence.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the game-overlay governance boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: GAME_OVERLAYS_STAY_EXPLICIT_REMOVABLE_AND_NON_BINDING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's core rule that game overlays are optional annotations only and cannot modify kernel law.

candidate_items.name: OVERLAY_NAMESPACE_AND_MAPPING_DISCIPLINE_IS_MANDATORY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps game analogies explicit and prevents them from hardening into identity or canonical correspondence claims.

candidate_items.name: NO_DEFAULT_PLAYERS_STRATEGIES_OR_INFORMATION_STRUCTURES
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's anti-agent and anti-strategic default boundary into a controller fence.

candidate_items.name: PAYOFF_AND_UTILITY_LANGUAGE_CANNOT_BECOME_SELECTION_OR_RANKING_LAW
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct quarantine against payoff and utility vocabulary turning into hidden preference doctrine.

candidate_items.name: NO_RATIONALITY_EQUILIBRIUM_OR_PREDICTIVE_AUTHORITY_IMPORT
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-equilibrium, anti-solution-concept, and anti-prediction posture into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: GAME_LANGUAGE_AS_AGENCY_OR_STRATEGIC_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows the vocabulary while denying default semantic force, so agency and strategic-authority overread must stay quarantined.

quarantined_items.name: PAYOFF_EQUILIBRIUM_AND_RATIONALITY_AS_HIDDEN_SELECTION_MACHINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it blocks payoff, equilibrium, and rationality language from becoming ranking, convergence, or winner-selection authority.

notes: This batch was produced as the seventeenth controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
